name: Mushroom & Barley Soup (Shulman)
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons chopped fresh dill or 1 tablespoon dried dill
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, sauté the onion in the butter or oil until translucent.
2. Add mushrooms and garlic, stirring for 2 minutes.
3. Add wine and thyme, sautéing another 3 minutes.
4. Stir in barley and continue sautéing for an additional 3 minutes.
5. Add soy flakes (if using) and broth, then bring to a boil.
6. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 40 minutes.
7. Season with salt and pepper.
8. Stir in sherry and dill before serving.
From Fast Vegetarian Feasts by Martha Rose Shulman.
